scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:video" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd services/auth-service && npm install && cd ../video-service && npm install && cd ../../gateway && npm install && cd ../shared && npm install
scripts.migrate: cd shared && npm run build && cd ../services/auth-service && npm run build && cd ../../ && ts-node -P migrations/tsconfig.json migrations/run_all_migrations.ts
scripts.migrate:auth: cd services/auth-service && npm run build && npm run migrate
scripts.migrate:video: cd services/video-service && npm run build && npm run migrate
